HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Nov-22-2016 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court's tentative ruling read "hearing required". The moving party failed to make an appearance. Luis Alvarado's claim of exemption is denied. The levying officer is directed to release any funds held to the judgment creditor for payment on the judgment. Order signed.
